---
title: "<<species>>"
subtitle: "<<authorship>>"
params:
  species: "<<species>>"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      #title-block-header .title{
          text-align:center;
          font-size:3rem;
          font-style:italic;
          font-family:Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
          color:#000;
          margin-bottom: 10rem !important;
          margin-top: 3rem !important;
      }
      </style>
---

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: hide
here::i_am("atlas-mnhnl.Rproj")
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
```



::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%" }

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| warning: false
#| message: false
ids <- col_synonyms(col_match(params$species)$usage_id)$label
cat('<div class="dropdown" id="menu-ids">\n')
cat('<button class="dropdown-btn" onclick="document.getElementById(\'menu-ids\').classList.toggle(\'open\')">Synonymes ▾</button>\n')
cat('<div class="dropdown-content scroller">\n')
for (i in ids) {
  cat(sprintf('<span>%s</span>\n', i))
}
cat('</div>\n</div>\n')
```


::: {.species-taxonomy}
**Sous-famille** <<subfamily>>   &nbsp; **Tribu** <<tribe>>
:::

::: {.species-taxonomy}
**EN** <<en>> <br>
**LB** <<lb>> <br>
**FR** <<fr>> <br>
**DE** <<de>>
:::


:::


::: {.column width="50%"}


## Conservation status {.no-top-margin}
::: {.columns .status-row}

::: {.column width="25%"}
### Europe
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
![](/images/LC.png){.logo}
:::

:::

::: {.columns .status-row}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### European Union<br>(27)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](/images/LC.png){.logo}
:::

:::

::: {.columns .status-row}

::: {.column width="25%"}
### Luxembourg  (preliminary)
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
![](/images/NTLU.png){.logo}
:::

:::

:::

:::


![](/images/<<name>>.jpeg){.species_photo}

## Activity period


```{r g-source}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig.height: 2
#| fig.width: 9
plot_heatmap(params$species)
```


## Description
## Habitat
### Immature
### Mature
## Distribution



```{r m3}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
get_species_map(params$species, data = DB4, rtp = rtp, base_map = base_map)
```

## Notes
